description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The figure stands upright with arms slightly outstretched to the sides, and the suit jacket is tailored with lapels and a visible shirt collar. The pants are straight-legged and the shoes are formal, matching the business attire. The face is simplified, with minimal facial features, and the skin tone is light. The hair is styled in a distinctive spiky ponytail, gathered high at the back of the head. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and professional.
description: A stylized adult in a formal business suit with a spiky ponytail, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has minimal facial features and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, shirt, tie, and facial features with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiky ponytail and the straight profile of the suit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, the ponytail, and the symmetrical stance.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail and the side profile of the attire.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
